title: Added --sort to ps
body:
Also podman ps now allows user to only output size of root FS, and changed language of images and ps --sort to be sorted by "created" as opposed to "time".

Finishes fix: #898 

Signed-off-by: haircommander <pehunt@redhat.com>

comments.body: before merging this, id like to run some perf on it and see what comes out...ill work with @haircommander on that first thing next week.

@mheon and I decided on IRC to change when the sorting happens. It now occurs before template or JSON output is decided, so now JSON and templated output can be sorted. This refactor is in anticipation for a larger job of moving away from the way ps is outputted, because it is currently a large bottleneck. PTAL @rhatdan @TomSweeneyRedHat @baude
